overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a teal cloak riding a horse through a snowy mountain forest. The character approaches ancient stone ruins with a glowing golden doorway, set in a winter landscape with overcast lighting and cool color grading.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail between rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a narrow snowy mountain path, navigating between snow-covered rock formations and pine trees

entered.detail: large boulders covered in snow flanking the left side of the trail
rocky outcrops with snow on the right side of the narrow path
tall evergreen trees lining the mountain trail ahead
steep mountain terrain rising on the left side
snowy mountain hillside descending on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a character riding a horse through a narrow, enclosed mountain trail. Snow-covered rocks flank both sides of the dirt path while pine trees line the route ahead. The environment is snowy and overcast with dense vegetation, creating a secluded winter atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail approaching ancient stone ruins

events.description: path widens revealing ancient stone ruins with archways visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride uphill toward the stone ruins, maintaining a steady pace as the trail opens up

entered.detail: weathered stone structures and crumbling walls visible ahead on the hillside
arched stone entrance forming part of the ruined structure
collapsed section of ancient wall beside the path

segments.scene_description: The trail widens as the character approaches ancient stone ruins on the mountainside. The dense rocky formations give way to a more open area with scattered pine trees. A stone archway and crumbling walls become visible in the distance, marking the transition from natural terrain to ancient architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruins with glowing golden doorway

events.description: character turns the horse sharply to the right toward a glowing golden structure
golden doorway emits bright light as the character approaches the ruins entrance

agents.ego_description: turning the horse toward a glowing golden doorway embedded in the stone ruins and approaching the entrance

entered.detail: ancient stone doorway emitting bright golden light and intricate glowing patterns
tall weathered stone columns flanking the left side of the ruins
tall weathered stone columns flanking the right side of the ruins

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the ancient stone ruins and turns toward a prominent golden glowing doorway embedded in the structure. The environment opens into a wide area with stone pillars flanking the entrance. The golden light from the doorway becomes the focal point as the character approaches the mysterious entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a secluded mountain trail that gradually opens into a wide plaza featuring ancient, glowing ruins. It begins with the character riding a horse along a narrow dirt path enclosed by snow-covered rocks and dense pine trees under an overcast sky. As the trail widens, the restrictive rocky formations give way to a more open mountainside where crumbling stone walls and an archway emerge from the winter landscape. The scene then expands into a broad area flanked by stone pillars before turning toward a prominent golden glowing doorway embedded in the ruins. This mysterious entrance becomes the focal point as the character approaches the radiant light.
